nasb.text: The child grew and was weaned, and Abraham made a great feast on the day that Isaac was weaned.

esv.text: And the child grew and was weaned. And Abraham made a great feast on the day that Isaac was weaned.

cnv.text: 孩子漸漸長大，就斷了奶。以撒斷奶的那天，亞伯拉罕擺設盛大的筵席。

ccb.text: 以撒渐渐长大，亚伯拉罕在他断奶的那天摆设宴席。

csbs.text: 孩子长大了，断了奶。在以撒断奶的那天，亚伯拉罕举行了盛大的宴席。
